analysis.summary: WooCommerce is a WordPress e-commerce plugin ecosystem that provides a complete online store solution. It processes orders, manages product catalogs, handles payments, and provides admin interfaces for store management.
capabilities: Processes e-commerce transactions and order management (plugins/woocommerce/includes/class-wc-order.php)
Manages product catalogs with variations, inventory, and pricing (plugins/woocommerce/includes/class-wc-product.php)
Provides REST API endpoints for store data access (plugins/woocommerce/includes/rest-api/)
Renders checkout and cart blocks for WordPress Block Editor (plugins/woocommerce-blocks/)
Handles payment processing integrations (plugins/woocommerce/includes/gateways/)
Provides administrative dashboard for store management (packages/js/admin-layout/)
Manages customer accounts and authentication (plugins/woocommerce/includes/class-wc-customer.php)
Processes shipping calculations and methods (plugins/woocommerce/includes/shipping/)
Handles tax calculations and compliance (plugins/woocommerce/includes/class-wc-tax.php)
Provides analytics and reporting capabilities (packages/js/components/)

api_endpoints.path: REST API endpoints for products, orders, customers (plugins/woocommerce/includes/rest-api/)
Store API endpoints for frontend blocks (docs/apis/store-api/)
Admin API endpoints for dashboard functionality

technical_facts: Processes e-commerce transactions and order management (plugins/woocommerce/includes/class-wc-order.php)
Manages product catalogs with variations, inventory, and pricing (plugins/woocommerce/includes/class-wc-product.php)
Provides REST API endpoints for store data access (plugins/woocommerce/includes/rest-api/)
Renders checkout and cart blocks for WordPress Block Editor (plugins/woocommerce-blocks/)
Handles payment processing integrations (plugins/woocommerce/includes/gateways/)
Provides administrative dashboard for store management (packages/js/admin-layout/)
Manages customer accounts and authentication (plugins/woocommerce/includes/class-wc-customer.php)
Processes shipping calculations and methods (plugins/woocommerce/includes/shipping/)
Handles tax calculations and compliance (plugins/woocommerce/includes/class-wc-tax.php)
Provides analytics and reporting capabilities (packages/js/components/)

architecture_patterns: Concurrency: synchronous PHP with async JavaScript components for admin interfaces
deployment_options: CI/CD: GitHub Actions (implied by repository structure)

functional_dna.logic_archetype_evidence: Manages complex e-commerce workflows across order management (class-wc-order.php), payment processing (gateways/), shipping calculations (shipping/), tax calculations (class-wc-tax.php), and customer account management (class-wc-customer.php) with persistent state
functional_dna.data_contract_evidence: REST API endpoints (plugins/woocommerce/includes/rest-api/) and Store API endpoints (docs/apis/store-api/) with defined schemas for products, orders, customers
functional_dna.core_algorithmic_evidence: Product catalog management (class-wc-product.php), order processing (class-wc-order.php), customer management (class-wc-customer.php) are fundamentally Create, Read, Update, Delete operations on business entities
functional_dna.concurrency_evidence: E-commerce transactions require consistency for order processing, payment handling, and inventory management to prevent overselling and maintain financial accuracy
functional_dna.repurposing_reasoning: High confidence due to generic business entity management patterns, standardized REST APIs, and modular architecture. Payment, shipping, tax, and inventory management are common across many business domains beyond e-commerce.

evidence_claims.claim: Provides REST API for data access

complexity_factors: Complex state management across PHP and JavaScript layers

required_fields: REST API endpoints for products, orders, customers

authentication.method: WordPress authentication, REST API keys, OAuth
